description: Unique record identifier from the City of Chicago crime dataset
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric where possible and retained for ordering and QA

description: Police case number associated with the incident
cleaning_notes: Trimmed and retained as an identifier

description: Date and time when the incident occurred
cleaning_notes: Converted to datetime; rows with missing or invalid dates are removed

description: High-level offense category such as THEFT or BATTERY
cleaning_notes: Trimmed and converted to uppercase

description: More detailed offense description
cleaning_notes: Trimmed and converted to uppercase

description: Type of place where the incident occurred
cleaning_notes: Trimmed and converted to uppercase; missing values retained

description: Whether an arrest was recorded for the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted from API true/false values to Boolean

description: Whether the incident was marked as domestic-related
cleaning_notes: Converted from API true/false values to Boolean

description: Police beat associated with the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric where possible

description: Police district associated with the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric where possible

description: Chicago ward associated with the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric where possible

description: Chicago community area code associated with the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric where possible; small number of missing values retained

description: Latitude coordinate for the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric; missing values retained in clean file and removed from map-ready file

description: Longitude coordinate for the incident
cleaning_notes: Converted to numeric; missing values retained in clean file and removed from map-ready file

description: Hour of day extracted from date using 24-hour time
cleaning_notes: Created from the cleaned date column

description: Name of the weekday extracted from date
cleaning_notes: Created from the cleaned date column

description: Month number extracted from date
cleaning_notes: Created from the cleaned date column

description: Month name extracted from date
cleaning_notes: Created from the cleaned date column

description: Year extracted from date
cleaning_notes: Created from the cleaned date column; should equal 2024 for this project

description: Indicator for Saturday or Sunday incidents
cleaning_notes: Created from day_of_week
